description: Create an aerodynamic performance map for a wind turbine rotor using QBlade's Multi-Parameter BEM simulation. Load a sample project from /home/ga/Documents/sample_projects/ (e.g., 'NREL_5MW.wpa') and perform a Multi-Parameter simulation with a fixed Wind Speed of 10 m/s, Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) from 2 to 14 (step 1), and Pitch Angle from -5 to 20 degrees (step 1). Save the project including the generated simulation results to /home/ga/Documents/projects/performance_map.wpa.
